title: calophyllum fraseri
intro: Calophyllum fraseri, also known as the Burmese sandalwood or yellow sandalwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is rich in medicinal compounds such as calophyllic acid and fraserin, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Calophyllum fraseri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and wellness.
